267.reason: [Incorrectly sets token type to AND for single '&' which should be an error; should not assign AND token type for single '&']

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly sets token type to AND for single '&' which should be an error; should not assign AND token type for single '&']
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly sets tokenType to AND for single '&' which should not be treated as AND token; this causes incorrect parsing and error handling]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly sets token type to AND for single '&' which should be an error; should not set tokenType to AND and should handle as invalid character instead]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Should not set tokenType to AND for single '&'; this masks the error and allows parsing to continue incorrectly]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [When encountering a single '&', it should not be treated as AND token type (which represents "&&"), but rather as an invalid single '&' that triggers error 'a'. The tokenType should remain as an invalid token or handle differently, but setting it to AND is incorrect.]

282.reason: [Incorrectly sets token type to OR for single '|' which should be an error; should not assign OR token type for single '|']

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly sets tokenType to OR for single '|' which should not be treated as OR token; this causes incorrect parsing and error handling]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly sets token type to OR for single '|' which should be an error; should not set tokenType to OR and should handle as invalid character instead]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Should not set tokenType to OR for single '|'; this masks the error and allows parsing to continue incorrectly]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [When encountering a single '|', it should not be treated as OR token type (which represents "||"), but rather as an invalid single '|' that triggers error 'a'. The tokenType should remain as an invalid token or handle differently, but setting it to OR is incorrect.]
